frontmatter.title: Coupled Populations Phase Dependence
frontmatter.description: Relative phase between coupled oscillating populations determines spike propagation effectiveness, confirming Communication-Through-Coherence.

frontmatter.title: Minimal validation of a PING Spiking Neural Network
Phase Dependence
frontmatter.description: Gamma oscillations create phase-dependent gating where identical inputs produce different responses depending on gamma phase.
